description_long: This is a modern, three-seater couch upholstered in a rich, burnt orange leather or leather-like material. The seat features a grid of deep tufting, giving it a plush and structured appearance, while the backrest is divided into two large, rectangular cushions that are slightly overstuffed for comfort. The armrests are straight, wide, and at the same height as the backrest, with cylindrical bolster pillows placed at each end for added support and style. The couch sits on short, black, cylindrical legs that are only partially visible, lending a subtle elevation and a contemporary touch. The overall silhouette is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with a slight sheen that enhances the color and texture.
description: A modern, burnt orange leather couch with deep tufted seating, wide straight armrests, and two large back cushions, elevated on short black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two large back cushions, deep tufted seat, and both bolster pillows on the armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, wide armrest, the cylindrical bolster pillow, and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back panel and the subtle elevation from the short legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest, bolster pillow, and the couch's boxy profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion with deep tufting; two cylindrical bolster pillows at each armrest; all cushions appear attached or integrated.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid burnt orange color with a grid of deep tufting on the seat; smooth, matte leather or leather-like finish with no visible decorative stitching or motifs.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed, cylindrical black legs, slightly recessed and minimalistic, providing subtle elevation.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, wide, and boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, each topped with a cylindrical bolster pillow; fully upholstered in matching material.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, divided backrest with two large, rectangular, overstuffed cushions; visually continuous and attached, matching the seat in material and color.
